inventory_guard.description: Fail closed unless inventory exists and hashes match.

backup_firmware_payload.description: Copy current firmware payload and metadata to immutable backup directory.

stage_inactive_slot.description: Stage rewrite artifacts into inactive A/B slot only.

verify_staged_hashes.description: Verify staged payload hash parity before any slot transition.

mark_slot_switch_on_reboot.description: Mark inactive slot as pending activation after restart.

rollback_on_stage_failure.description: Keep current active slot and preserve backup pointer on failure.

program_intel_pcie_fabric.description: Apply Intel bus/chipset primitive policy operations (metadata-planned).

program_amd_pcie_fabric.description: Apply AMD bus/chipset primitive policy operations (metadata-planned).

program_generic_uefi_bus_policy.description: Fallback bus policy operations for unknown/unsupported boards.
